## Submission Checklist

- [x] I ran `mkdocs serve` and confirmed my notes preview correctly
- [ ] My full name and date are at the top of my notes file
- [ ] My file is named after my GitHub username (e.g. `name.md`)
- [ ] My file is inside the correct `docs/uniX/` folder
- [ ] No spelling errors — I proofread before submitting
- [ ] Code blocks use proper syntax highlighting (e.g. ```python)
- [ ] I pulled latest changes first: `git pull upstream main`
- [ ] My branch name describes the topic (e.g. `week3-sorting-algorithms`)
- [ ] I have NOT touched any other student's file
- [ ] I have NOT modified any files outside the `docs/` folder
